## 🐛 Bug Description
A clear description of the bug.

## 📋 Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## ✅ Expected Behavior
What should have happened.

## ❌ Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## 🖥️ Environment
- **Browser:** (e.g. Chrome 125)
- **Mode:** GitHub Pages / Flask Backend
- **AI Mode:** Gemini ON / OFF

## 📸 Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.
